name: Gold Fields Limited
anchor_note: FY2025 figures are REPORTED ACTUALS (sacred) verified against the official Gold Fields FY2025 reviewed-results microsite / SEC Form 6-K, 19-20 Feb 2026. Forward FY2026e/FY2027e scenario drivers are analyst ESTIMATES (e).
source: Gold Fields FY2025 reviewed results, SEC Form 6-K, 19-20 Feb 2026; FY2026 company guidance per same release.

south_deep.note: South Deep is the SOLE South African mine, ~90.2% owned. It is the only Gold Fields asset whose costs are ZAR-denominated and the only asset on the Eskom grid. It is ~13-15% of group attributable ounces (~320koz of 2.438Moz, ramping toward a ~380koz/a run-rate). Australian costs are AUD; Ghana/Peru/Chile broadly USD-linked. This localises BOTH the rand-FX channel and the load-shedding channel to South Deep, muting group-level USD sensitivity vs a pure-SA miner.

fy2026_company_guidance.source: Gold Fields FY2025 results release / Q1 2026 update (7 May 2026)

calibration_check: Model gold-only EBITDA proxy for FY2025A = (3496 - 1645) x 2.438 + 1029 = US$5,542m vs reported adjusted EBITDA US$5,637m = 98.3% (within 2%).
